zh.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale是Robert de Tyndale IV的兒子，於1344年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾坦索。他於大約1364年與Lady Elizabeth De Deane在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1413年7月21日在英國英格蘭享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale是Robert de Tyndale IV的儿子，于1344年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾坦索。他于大约1364年与Lady Elizabeth De Deane在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1413年7月21日在英国英格兰享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tyndale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex and Nottinghamshire): variant of   Tindall  . This surname is also established in Jamaica.

variants.name: Tindall
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from Tynedale, the valley of the river Tyne, or from a place in Cumbria called Tindale, which is situated on a tributary of the South Tyne. The name derives from a British river name Tina (apparently from a Celtic root meaning ‘to flow’) + Old English dæl or Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale was born in 1344, in Tansor, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Robert de Tyndale IV. He married Lady Elizabeth De Deane about 1364, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 21 July 1413, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale est né en 1344, à Tansor, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Robert de Tyndale IV. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth De Deane environ 1364, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1413, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale wurde 1344 in Tansor, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Robert de Tyndale IV geboren. Er hat um 1364 in England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth De Deane geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 21. Juli 1413 im Alter von 69 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale è nato il nel 1344 nel Tansor, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Robert de Tyndale IV. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth De Deane circa 1364, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 21 luglio 1413, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Tyndaleは1344年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアタンソルでRobert de Tyndale IVの息子として生まれた。約1364年にイギリスイギリスでLady Elizabeth De Deaneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1413年7月21日にイギリスイギリスで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale(은)는 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 탠소르에서 Robert de Tyndale IV의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1364년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Elizabeth De Deane(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1413년 7월 21일 영국 잉글랜드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale nasceu em 1344, em Tansor, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Robert de Tyndale IV. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth De Deane aproximadamente 1364, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1413, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale родился в 1344 г. в местности тансор, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Robert de Tyndale IV. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth De Deane около 1364 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 21 июля 1413 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William de Tyndale nació en 1344, en Tansor, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Robert de Tyndale IV. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth De Deane aproximadamente 1364, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 21 de julio de 1413, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
